questions.text: In the context of Indian defence which one of the following state- ments is not correct?

options.text: With the induction of Prithvi- II, the IAF is the only Air Force in the world with surface-to- surface ballistic missiles under its command
Sukhoi-30 MKJ jet fighters can launch Air-to-Air and Air-to- Surface precision missiles
Trishul is a supersonic Surface to Air missile with a range of 30 km

questions.explanation: The correct answer is option C: Trishul is a supersonic Surface to Air missile with a range of 30 km

It is a device which allows the army to undertake a right reconnaissance
It is an unmanned aerial vehicle which can travel up to 300 metres high

questions.text: Which of the following statements is not true with regard to the F-18 Super Hornet?

options.text: It is fighter plane, which is built by U.S. aerospace company
It can be used during both night and day
Worldwide eight countries are using it in Air Force

questions.explanation: The correct answer is option A: It is fighter plane, which is built by U.S. aerospace company

questions.text: ‘Operation Shakti-98’ is the name

Given to air exercises carried out by Indian Air Force SU30 planes

questions.explanation: The correct answer is option A: Given to the nuclear test carried out a Pokharan in 1998

A battleship indigenously built in India

questions.explanation: The correct answer is option B: Joint Naval Exercise Conducted by India and Sri Lanka

questions.text: What is ‘New START’ treaty?

options.text: It is a bilateral strategic nuclear arms reduction treaty between the USA and the Russian Federation
It is a multilateral energy security co-operation treaty among the members of the East Asia Summit
It is a treaty between the Russian Federation and the European Union for the energy security co-operation
It is a multilateral co-operation treaty among the BRICS countries for the promotion of trade

questions.explanation: The correct answer is option A: It is a bilateral strategic nuclear arms reduction treaty between the USA and the Russian Federation

questions.text: What is Friendship-2016?

options.text: The Joint military exercise by the soliders of Russia and Pakistan
The Joint military exercise by the soldiers of America and India
The Joint military exercise by the soldiers of India and Afghanistan
The Joint military exercise by the soldiers of India and Kajhakhastan

questions.explanation: The correct answer is option A: The Joint military exercise by the soliders of Russia and Pakistan

questions.text: Match List-I with List-II and select the correct answer using the code given below the lists. List-I (a) Prithvi (b) Trishul (c) Pinaka (d) Nishant List-II 1. Multi-barrel rocket launcher 2. A remote operated battlefield inspection vehicle 3. Surface-to-surface missile 4. Surface to air missile Code (a) (b) (c) (d)
questions.explanation: The correct answer is option B: 3 4 1 2

questions.text: Match List-I with List-II and select the correct answer using the code given below the lists. List-I (a) Trishul (b) Prithvi (c) Agni (d) NAG List-II 1. Anti-tank missile 2. Intermediate range ballistic system 3. Short range surface to air missile 4. Surface-to-surface missile Code (a) (b) (c) (d)
questions.explanation: The correct answer is option C: 3 4 2 1

questions.text: Consider the following statements. 1. In the year 2006, India successfully tested a full- fledged cryogenic stage in rocketry. 2. After USA, Russia and China, India is the only country to have acquired the capability for use of cryogenic stage in rocketry. Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is option A: Only 1

questions.text: Consider the following statements. 1. In November, 2006, DRDO successfully conducted the interception test using a Prithvi-II missile. 2. Prithvi-II is a surface-to-surface missile and can be deployed to guard the metros against air attacks. Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is option C: Both 1 and 2

questions.text: Match List-I with List-II and select the correct answer using the code given below the lists. List-I (a) Arihant (b) Awacs (c) Atlas Centaur (d) Nag List-II 1. American Cryogenic Rocket 2. Anti-tank missile 3. Israel developed Falcon for Air Force 4. Atomic submarine Code (a) (b) (c) (d)
questions.explanation: The correct answer is option B: 4 3 1 2

questions.text: With reference to Agni-IV Missile, which of the following statements is/are correct? 1. It is a surface-to-surface missile. 2. It is fueled by liquid propellant only. 3. It can deliver one-tonne nuclear warheads about 7500 km away. Select the correct answer using the code given below.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is option A: Only 1

questions.text: In the context of Indian defence, consider the following statements. 1. The Shaurya missile flies with a speed of more than 8 Mach. 2. The range of Shaurya missile is more than 1600 km. Which of the statements given above is/are correct?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is option D: Neither 1 nor 2

questions.text: Consider the following in respect of Indian Ocean Naval Symposium (IONS). 1. Inaugural IONS was held in India in 2015 under the chairmanship of the Indian Navy. 2. IONS is a voluntary initiative that seeks to increase maritime co-operation among navies of the littoral states of the Indian Ocean Region. Which of the above statements is/ are correct?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is option B: Only 2
